task_updates.executor_notes: Final verification completed. Targeted topic-editor suite passed: `pytest tests/test_topic_editor_core.py tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py -x -q` -> 152 passed, 2 dependency warnings. Targeted live-update/backfill/media-understanding suite initially exposed a local import shadowing issue from an installed `scripts` package; added `scripts/__init__.py`, then `pytest tests/test_live_update_editor_publishing.py tests/test_live_update_editor_lifecycle.py tests/test_backfill_live_update_topics.py tests/test_topic_editor_media_understanding.py -x -q` passed -> 20 passed, 2 dependency warnings. Full suite initially exposed repo test import packaging issues and a missing admin live-update status surface; added `tests/__init__.py`, root `conftest.py`, and the narrow `get_live_update_status`/queryable-table support in `src/features/admin_chat/tools.py`. Final full suite passed: `pytest -x -q` -> 658 passed, 19 skipped, 4 dependency warnings. Wrote and ran throwaway `tmp_nebsh_topic_editor_repro.py`; it confirmed an accepted NebSH `post_topic` scenario with exactly one block, media attached, `[text, media]` render units, and no section-header markup. The script printed `nebsh-repro-ok` and was deleted.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: SC9 satisfied: both targeted pytest commands passed, full `pytest -x -q` passed across the repo, and the throwaway NebSH repro script was written, run successfully, and deleted.
